title: Leads workspace: How do I create an automation where once an email is opened, the status is changed?
excerpt:
I have a list of leads in which I emailed from within the monday CRM with email tracking on. I’m wondering how I get the status to change (or even just separate them), once they’ve opened the email? 
Thanks!

posts.author: adamsardo (Adam Sardo)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a list of leads in which I emailed from within the monday CRM with email tracking on. I’m wondering how I get the status to change (or even just separate them), once they’ve opened the email?

Thanks!

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there! Would this automation recipe work for this?

You can find it by going to your Emails & Activities section in the Updates Section, clicking the settings gear icon , and scrolling down to “Set up automations and notifications”.

I hope this helps!
